/* === Variant: crate (416x346, depth 336) === */
/* Generated by BoxForge v1.0 — 6 panes (5 struct, 1 lid, 0 extra) */

.box3d-wrap.crate-variant {
  --crate-w: 416px;
  --crate-h: 346px;
  --box-d: 168px;
  --box-half: -168px;
  --bevel-w: 2px;
  --box-dark: #5a3a0a;
  --box-dark2: #3c1c00;
  --box-light: #c49a40;
  --box-floor: #3a2808;
  --box-ceil: #8a6020;
  --box-glow: rgba(200,160,60,0.6);
  --perspective: 802px;
  perspective: 802px;
  width: 416px;
  height: 346px;
}
.box3d-wrap.crate-variant .box3d-scene {
  width: 416px; height: 346px;
  transform: rotateX(-18deg) rotateY(-10deg);
}
.box3d-wrap.crate-variant .box3d-spin {
  width: 416px; height: 346px;
}
.crate-variant .box3d-body {
  width: 416px; height: 346px;
}

/* Back (back): 416 x 346 */
.box3d-wrap.crate-variant .bf-back {
  width: 416px; height: 346px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #5a3a0a, #c49a40);
  transform: translateZ(-168px) translate(0px,0px);
}
/* Left (left): 336 x 346 */
.box3d-wrap.crate-variant .bf-left {
  width: 336px; height: 346px;
  left: 40px; top: 0px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #5a3a0a, #c49a40);
  transform: translate(-207px,0px) rotateY(90deg) translateZ(0px);
}
/* Sub-box: depth 6px */
.box3d-wrap.crate-variant .bf-left { transform-style: preserve-3d; }
.box3d-wrap.crate-variant .bf-left > .sub-edge-back {
  position: absolute; pointer-events: none;
  width: 336px; height: 346px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #a67c22, #c49a40);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);

}

/* Lid: Crate Lid (418x336, hinge: slide-right, open: 104°, hover: 17°) */
.box3d-wrap.crate-variant .box3d-lid-wrap {
  position: absolute; transform-style: preserve-3d;
  width: 418px; height: 336px;
  left: -1px; top: 5px;
  transform: translateZ(168px) translate(-1px,-4px);
}
.box3d-wrap.crate-variant .box3d-lid {
  width: 418px; height: 336px;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, #c49a40 0px, #c49a40 8px, #a67c22 8px, #a67c22 9px);
  transform-origin: center center;
  transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1);
}
.box3d-wrap.crate-variant.hovered .box3d-lid {
  transform: translateX(17%);
}
.box3d-wrap.crate-variant.opened .box3d-lid {
  transform: translateX(100%);
}
/* Sub-box: depth 15px */

/* === GLOW SOURCES (4) === */
.crate-glow-0 { /* Floor glow */
  position: absolute;
  width: 582px; height: 484px;
  left: calc(50% - 291px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 242px + 164px);
  transform: translateZ(119px) rotateX(90deg) rotateY(0deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(220,200,160,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.crate-glow-1 { /* Cross glow 1 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 458px; height: 381px;
  left: calc(50% - 229px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 190.5px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(220,200,160,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.crate-glow-2 { /* Cross glow 2 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 437px; height: 363px;
  left: calc(50% - 218.5px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 181.5px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(60deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(220,200,160,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.crate-glow-3 { /* Cross glow 3 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 420px; height: 349px;
  left: calc(50% - 210px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 174.5px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(120deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(220,200,160,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}


/* === PHASE ANIMATIONS (applied to wrapper) === */
/* Phase 3: glow */
